title: Trymalium daphnoides

The Rhamnaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the buckthorn or dogwood family. Trymalium daphnoides is native to Australia and is found in the eastern and southern regions of the country. The plant is a shrub or small tree that is often found growing in dry forests and woodlands.
